history.qwen_observation: UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 partially migrated to jakarta but left javax.* imports and Spring Security 5.x API usage, causing compilation failures.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding explicit JavaxMigrationToJakarta and JavaxServletMigrationToJakartaServlet recipes ensures all remaining javax.* imports are converted to jakarta.*. SpringBoot3BestPractices helps migrate Spring Security 5.x APIs (securityMatcher, ignoringRequestMatchers, etc.) to their Spring Security 6.x equivalents. These steps run under JDK 17 before upgrading the build to JDK 21.

history.qwen_observation: The Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade partially migrated to Jakarta but left residual javax.persistence and javax.servlet references, and Spring Security 5.x API calls (securityMatcher, ignoringRequestMatchers) incompatible with Security 6.x.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly running JavaxMigrationToJakarta and JavaxServletMigrationToJakartaServlet after the SB3 upgrade catches leftover namespace references. MigrateToHibernate62 ensures the JPA/Hibernate persistence layer aligns with Jakarta EE 10. SpringBoot3BestPractices addresses remaining Spring Security 6.x API deprecations. This completes the framework migration before proceeding to JDK 21 plugin and build upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 recipe failed to fully migrate javax.* imports and dependencies to jakarta.*, causing compilation errors for missing EntityManagerFactory and mixed servlet namespaces, alongside unresolved Spring Security 6 API changes.
history.qwen_rationale: Pre-loading Jakarta dependencies via pom_patch ensures the classpath has the required APIs before migration. Explicitly running JavaxMigrationToJakarta alongside UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 guarantees complete namespace conversion. SpringBoot3BestPractices will address remaining API deprecations like securityMatcher. The chain then proceeds to Java 21 plugin and build upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: The pom_patch step added jakarta dependencies but left source code referencing javax.*, causing immediate compilation failure; the project requires a full Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x migration to handle the javax→jakarta namespace shift and framework compatibility for Java 21.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the premature pom_patch and relying on UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 as the primary migration step ensures that both source code (javax→jakarta) and dependency management (SB 2.7→3.3) are updated atomically. This meta-recipe internally composes the necessary Jakarta migration, plugin upgrades, and build configuration changes, after which standard Java 21 plugin and build upgrades can safely apply.

history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade changed dependencies to Jakarta EE 10 but failed to migrate javax.* imports and Spring Security 6 API usages, causing compilation failures.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly adding JavaxMigrationToJakarta, JakartaEE10, and SpringBoot3BestPractices alongside UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 ensures all javax imports are converted to jakarta, dependencies are aligned, and Spring Boot 3 best practices (including Security 6 API adjustments) are applied before compilation.
